question:
Over $2B committed to the Monad public sale?

Description: This market will resolve to “Yes” if total commitments for the Monad raise on Coinbase exceeds the number specified in the title before the raise closes. Otherwise, it will resolve to “No.”

The resolution source is the "Total requested" value displayed on the Coinbase raise page available at https://www.coinbase.com/token-sales/monad.

If the final commitment amount cannot be verified by December 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET, or if relevant information becomes permanently unavailable within the market timeframe, this market will resolve to “No.”

evidences.title: Coinbase's Transparency in Token Sales: Monad's Chance to Succeed | Diego Martin posted on the topic | LinkedIn
evidences.content: infrastructure → Echo/Sonar (acquired October 2025) - Secondary market → Coinbase exchange Monad token sale is happening on November 17th, followed by the launch of the mainnet and listing on Coinbase exchange on Nov 24th. Not the worst advice to lock your eyes on it, and study what actually works in the market of token launches. Link for the full document in the first comment. [...] market makers controlling > 90% of circulating supply. The planned initial float was 143M WLD (which would put MM control at ~70%), infrastructure issues with the airdrop meant that at the immediate launch, the 100M tokens held by market makers constituted roughly 95% of the actual circulating supply. Community did not appreciate how the events unfolded. Monad has every chance to be different. Partly because unlike Worldcoin, Monad is disclosing the terms of the the initial token sale, and only getting listed on Coinbase exchange a week later. On the other hand, Coinbase offers unmatched token launch stack: - Primary market access via the Coinbase token sales platform - Cap table management via LiquiFi (acquired July 2025) - Fundraising infrastructure → Echo/Sonar (acquired October 2025) [...] It wo...

evidences.title: Monad's MON token sale planned for Coinbase platform
evidences.content: Monad, a Layer-1 blockchain project, said its public MON token sale would open on Coinbase’s token sales platform on November 17, with mainnet planned for November 24, 2025. The project also described tokenomics and said a large portion of supply would be locked at launch under vesting schedules.

evidences.title: How to Participate in Coinbase's Token Sale Platform - CCN.com
evidences.content: Why is Coinbase’s new token sale platform important? For the first time since 2018, U.S. retail investors can legally participate in new token launches under a compliant framework. It brings crypto fundraising back onshore, within U.S. regulation, making the process safer, fairer, and more transparent. When does the first token sale happen? The first sale will feature Monad (MON), a high-performance blockchain protocol. The sale will run from Nov. 17 to 22, 2025. Who can participate? Anyone with a verified Coinbase account that meets the platform’s KYC (Know Your Customer) and compliance requirements can join. Users must also be in eligible regions, primarily the U.S. [...] Monad launch details. | Credit: Monad X profile Coinbase states that the algorithm is designed to make token launches fairer and more sustainable, focusing on community-driven growth rather than short-term hype. ## Monad (MON): The First Sale The Monad token (MON) is the first project to launch through Coinbase’s new platform. Here are the main details of the sale: Dates: Nov. 1722, 2025. Token symbol: MON. Public allocation: 7.5% of total supply. Token price: $0.025 per MON. Implied valuation: $2.5 billion f...

evidences.title: Monad's Mission: Why Monad?
evidences.content: ## Public sale on Coinbase token sales platform Decentralization is only possible with widely distributed ownership of the MON token. A healthy ecosystem consists not only of developers and users, but also tokenholders. We are pleased to share that Coinbase has provided a platform for the Monad Foundation to distribute MON through a public sale by its subsidiary, MF Services (BVI), Ltd. The Coinbase token sales platform brings public sales to retail purchasers in the US and globally, allowing for smaller allocations across more participants. The public sale will enable the purchase of MON tokens right before the launch of Monad Public Mainnet on November 24th, 2025. It will open on Monday, November 17th, 2025 at 9:00 AM ET and run until Saturday, November 22nd, 2025 at 9:00 PM ET. evidences.title: Complete Guide to the Upcoming Public Token Sale on Coinbase
evidences.content: ## Overview: What Is Monad? Monad is a high-throughput, EVM-compatible blockchain designed to deliver over 10,000 transactions per second (TPS) with low transaction fees and rapid finality of around 0.8 seconds. The project’s mission is to tackle the scalability challenges seen in leading networks like Ethereum while ensuring decentralization and providing widespread access for both users and developers. Since its founding in 2022, Monad, operated by Category Labs, has raised $225 million from notable backers such as Paradigm, Dragonfly Capital, Electric Capital, and Castle Island Ventures. The network is set to launch with 200 globally distributed validators running on consumer-grade hardware to further lower the barriers to entry. ## Public MON Token Sale: Key Dates and Details [...] A welcome pack worth 6200 USDT for new users! Sign up now! Monad, a next-generation Layer-1 blockchain, is preparing for the highly anticipated launch of its native MON token, with a public sale taking place on Coinbase’s newly launched Token Sales platform. Backed by prominent investors and built by Category Labs, Monad is positioning itself as a high-performance, Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM)-c...

evidences.title: Monad crypto price prediction: Early market trends
evidences.content: Monad is a high-performance, Ethereum-compatible Layer-1 blockchain designed for up to 10,000 TPS, near-zero gas fees, and near-instant finality. Its parallel execution architecture aims to increase throughput while preserving Ethereum smart contract compatibility. MON has a capped supply of 100 billion tokens, with planned distribution including ecosystem development, team, investors, public sale, treasury, and community projects.

evidences.title: Monad to raise $188m in Coinbase's first public token sale
evidences.content: But the lack of regulation meant ICOs were mired in hundreds of dubious projects, if not outright scams. They were swiftly cracked down on by the US Securities and Exchange Commission. Bipartisan support for crypto legislation in the US, coupled with a more permissive approach to industry regulation from President Donald Trump's administration, has given firms the confidence to revisit previously popular ideas. ## Surge in demand The sale comes amid a surge in demand for early-stage crypto investments. Last month, rival blockchain project MegaETH sold $50 million worth of its native token at a $1 billion valuation through Sonar, a token sale venue tied to early-stage investing platform Echo. evidences.content: > Coinbase just bought Echo > > The crypto investing platform founded by Cobie for $375 million. > > Here’s what’s happening and the reasons why Coinbase did this: > > Echo is like an AngelList for crypto, where verified investors join private deals under the same terms as VCs. > > Since… pic.twitter.com/rafqQDVYEN > > — StarPlatinum (@StarPlatinumSOL) October 21, 2025 Just last month, MegaETH raised $50 million in only five minutes using Echo’s Sonar platform, with total pledges crossing $300 million. Meanwhile, other players like Kraken and Andre Cronje’s Flying Tulip are also joining the new wave of token sales, but with stricter rules and regulatory oversight. [...] The new Coinbase token sales platform comes on the heels of its acquisition of Echo, a crypto fundraising platform that helps crypto projects raise money directly from its community, for $375 million. Now, Echo’s tech powers Coinbase’s system, making it easier and more transparent for projects to connect with everyday investors. evidences.title: Paradigm leads $225 million round for Monad Labs, which ... - Fortune
evidences.content: # Paradigm leads $225 million round for Monad Labs, which is building a layer 1 blockchain to take on Ethereum and Solana A pile of gold coins tipping over With crypto markets roaring back, different blockchains are jockeying to become the solution that hoovers up demand in the next wave, just as Bitcoin and Ethereum did in past cycles. A new player on the scene, Monad Labs, finalized a $225 million round led by Paradigm with additional funding by investors including Electric Capital and Greenoaks to build a layer 1 blockchain to challenge competitors such as Solana and Sui. (Fortune previously reported that Monad was in talks with Paradigm to raise money at a $3 billion valuation in March.) [...] ## ‘A much more performant blockchain’ After raising a $19 million seed round announced in 2023, Monad’s $225 million funding round represents the largest crypto fundraise of 2024 so far, according to Crunchbase’s Web3 Tracker, signaling that the sector’s bear market is beginning to thaw. Paradigm, the crypto VC firm leading the round, is reportedly raising a new fund over $750 million. The round also represents one of the first crypto deals for Greenoaks Capital, the VC firm led by ve...

evidences.title: MegaETH developer raises $10 million in 3 minutes on Cobie's Echo
evidences.content: "Hello yogi bear. Megaeth sold out $10m on echo within moments," Cobie told The Block. "It was previously one of the most requested projects and in real-time it was the highest demand we have ever seen. If you didn't fund within the first 55 seconds then you missed out on the first wave, and 70 seconds on the second wave. It was oversubscribed by several multiples and 5,000 people attempted to fund in the first three minutes, and 80% of echo users attempted to fund. I am very tired now and need to go to sleep. Have a nice day Yoges," Cobie added, emphasizing his full quote should be included along with the yogi bear. ## Growing momentum for community funding [...] ## Echo's largest sale to date MegaLabs' $10 million round on Echo marks the platform's largest sale since its beta launch in April, Kong noted. The round attracted around 3,200 investors from 94 countries, with an average check size of $3,140 per investor, Kong said. evidences.title: The ideal way to launch – introducing token sales on Coinbase
evidences.content: By Coinbase Nov 10, 2025 _TL;DR:__Token issuers coming to market today struggle to get their tokens into the hands of real users while building deep exchange liquidity. Coinbase is changing that. We are launching an end-to-end token sales platform to set a new standard, focused on creating a more sustainable and transparent way for projects to distribute tokens and decentralize. In addition, US retail traders can now widely participate in public token sales for the first time since 2018. This could signal a return to retail-friendly offerings, only now with more guardrails and structure. It also raises the bar for how new tokens make their way to market. For now, all eyes will be on Monad and how the platform handles its first big test.
